signals.headline: US March 2026 CPI Annual Inflation Jumps to 3
signals.raw:
US March 2026 CPI Annual Inflation Jumps to 3.3% (from 2.4%), Highest Since May 2024; Core at 2.6% (Below 2.7% Forecast)** | YES | HIGH
